name: nodo-clock-in
description: NODO CLOCK-IN — sistema de control de asistencia para empacadora

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=server & npm run dev --workspace=client & wait
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=client
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p client/tsconfig.json
